title: Harley the Clown
description: Beginner made Horror Mod that adds a hostile mob entity "Harlequin Rabbit". Requires Geckolib to work.
body:
This Horror mod simply adds the entity Harley, or the Harlequin Rabbit to your world.

He's not perfectly made as I'm a complete beginner in coding and this was made purely for fun, and this mod works best when accompanied with other hostile mods than as a standalone. He doesn't have custom sound either as I couldn't figure that much out yet.

He'll probably get updated in the future with better coding, although for now he's gonna have basic coding and behaviors. I do have plans for something better but it'll be when I have time to learn MCreator's coding properly.

Check the YouTube video dedicated to this mod if you wish that explains it further: https://youtu.be/lgmH3j7pA6o?si=gLzJ-0ybvnUOML_6

Thank you very much if you play it and have as much fun as you can have with it. Suggestions and advice are welcome, as long as they remain constructive.
